seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The total word count of the email must not exceed 200 words, and the email must include at least three paragraphs.
new_constraint: Each paragraph must contain at least 70 words.
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The total word count of the email must not exceed 200 words, and the email must include at least three paragraphs. Each paragraph must contain at least 70 words.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Recent Transaction - Account [Your Account Number]

Dear [Bank Name] Customer Service Team,

I am writing to request clarification regarding a recent transaction that appeared on my account statement for the month of [Month, Year]. Specifically, I noticed a debit entry dated [Date of Transaction] for the amount of [Transaction Amount], identified as [Transaction Description, if provided]. This particular charge is unfamiliar to me, and I do not recall authorizing a payment or purchase matching this description at that time. Could you please provide detailed information about the source of this transaction, including the merchant name, location, or any transaction reference number that might assist in my investigation?

I would greatly appreciate it if you could thoroughly investigate this specific transaction and furnish me with all available documentation pertaining to it. Understanding the nature and origin of this charge is crucial for my financial records and peace of mind. If this transaction has been flagged for any reason, or if there is any supporting documentation I need to review to better understand it, please forward those details to me at your earliest convenience so I can follow up appropriately on this matter.

Thank you for your time and prompt attention to this important inquiry. I value my relationship with [Bank Name] and rely on your assistance to ensure the accuracy of my account activity. Please let me know the next steps required from my end, or if a phone call would be a more efficient way to resolve this discrepancy. I can be reached by replying to this email or by phone at [Your Phone Number].

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Account Number]<turn|>
